test_split.definition: v4 split_v4=='test' parquet (held out from v5 training)

validation: LINK AUPRC 0.5834 / AUROC 0.6109 reproduces v5's reported test 0.583/0.6108 to within 0.0001, and SIGN 0.3147/0.6054 reproduces 0.3147/0.6053 — confirms the PCA-613 projection from the v4 basis (components+mean, raw human restored via human_mean, single v4 transform) is exact.
notes: v5 (pooled two-tower, PCA-613) on the TRUE held-out test split. An earlier run mistakenly pooled train+val+test and filtered chr3/chr13 (which are v5 TRAIN chromosomes) — that leaked and is discarded. Gene prioritization: for each gene with >=2 candidate enhancers and >=1 true link in the held-out set, rank candidates by predicted link prob; precision@1 and MRR vs a nearest-enhancer (distance) baseline. Model edge over distance is modest (+1.0pt p@1) but real, and the model adds SIGN (repressive AUROC 0.605) which distance cannot provide.
